title: Quiet Hours
rule: Maintain quiet after 22:00 (10 PM) until 08:00 (8 AM)
description: Loud music, parties, or excessive noise during these hours may result in complaints and penalties.

title: No Pets Allowed
rule: Pets are strictly prohibited in the apartment
description: No dogs, cats, birds, or any other animals are permitted. Service animals require prior approval and documentation.

title: Non-Smoking Property
rule: Smoking is prohibited inside the apartment and common areas
description: Smoking including cigarettes, cigars, and vaping is only allowed in designated outdoor areas.

title: Guest Policy
rule: Guests must be registered and cannot stay longer than 7 consecutive days
description: All overnight guests must be registered at the front desk. Extended stays require landlord approval.

title: Damage Responsibility
rule: Tenants are responsible for all damages beyond normal wear and tear
description: Report any damages immediately. Repair costs will be deducted from security deposit.

title: Assigned Parking Only
rule: Use only your assigned parking space
description: Unauthorized vehicles in assigned spots will be towed at owner's expense.

title: Proper Waste Disposal
rule: Dispose of trash in designated bins and follow recycling guidelines
description: Trash must be placed in proper containers. Recycling is mandatory where available.
